name: Dr. Greens Golf & Entertainment Westborough
about: Dr. Greens Golf & Entertainment is a top-tier virtual golf center with locations in Ashland and Westborough, MA. It features state-of-the-art simulators, full-service bars, and entertainment like pool, shuffleboard, and darts. The venue offers nearly 100 unique courses, including Ryder Cup tracks and iconic locations like Pebble Beach. Dr. Greens provides a range of pricing options with discounted weekday rates and is positioned as an ideal environment for both casual play and serious practice during winter months.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content doesn't explicitly specify, but typically at virtual golf centers, you can use your own clubs or they may provide rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full-service bar and food offerings available on-site at each location.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content doesn't specify exact timing, but simulator rounds typically take 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Dr. Greens positions itself as a family-friendly center with entertainment options beyond golf that would appeal to various age groups.
